title: Stuffed Enab with Mexican Flair
description: A twist on traditional Middle Eastern stuffed enab, this Mexican-inspired recipe adds crispy tortilla strips and a spicy kick.
instructions: Pierce the enab with a fork to prevent bursting during baking.
Bake the enab for 15 minutes, or until tender.
Sauté the warak enab with a pinch of cumin until lightly browned.
In a separate pan, melt the Middle Eastern cheese over low heat.
Assemble the enab by spreading the melted cheese on top of each enab, followed by a spoonful of the warak enab mixture and crispy tortilla strips.
